top_signals.title: ITC CEO Says Data Centers Will Put 'Downward Pressure on Rates'
top_signals.summary: ITC Holding CEO Krista Tanner says that there is a misconception that data centers increase costs for consumers. Tanner spoke with Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall on the sidelines of the Edison Electric Institute 2026 Conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Treasury Yields Fall Amid Easing Fears of Escalation in Middle East - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Treasury Yields Fall Amid Easing Fears of Escalation in Middle East  WSJ

top_signals.title: SpaceX pitches investors $1.78tn valuation in historic IPO
top_signals.summary: Rocket and AI group is seeking to raise up to $86bn in biggest Wall Street debut of all time
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Former Trump advisor John Bolton agrees to plead guilty to retaining classified information, MS NOW reports
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trafigura Pays Record Dividend as Profit Hits $4 Billion
top_signals.summary: Trafigura Group made a record payout to its top traders and executives as the commodity trading giant reaped profits of over $4 billion in the first half of its financial year.

top_signals.title: Senate Republicans urged financial regulators to rework bank capital rules for digital assets
top_signals.summary: A group of Senate Republicans is pressing key financial regulatory agencies to clarify capital standards for digital assets.
